meaning: n.葡萄种植和葡萄酒酿造业
examples: Chile's unique combination of geography and climate make it ideal for winegrowing.
Always active in the domain of winegrowing, they specialized in distillation much later on and have since continued to stand strong throughout twenty generations!
The huge diversity in soils here (from gravel to limestone to clay and sand) and a microclimate ideally suited to winegrowing lends to a wide variety of wine styles.
Just look at Bordeaux, the most prestigious winegrowing region on the planet.
